title: Integrated Sediment Yield Estimation and Control in Erosion-Prone Watersheds: A Systematic Review of Models, Strategies, and Emerging Technologies
description: SpeakForWater Episode 5: Integrated Sediment Yield Estimation and Control in Erosion-Prone Watersheds: A Systematic Review of Models, Strategies, and Emerging Technologies. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
